name: Scenes Phase - Individual File Creation
description: Tests that scenes are created individually with separate output files, not bundled together in a single file like plans/scenes.md.
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. You must process scenes ONE AT A TIME. Each scene must be saved to its own file in the scenes/ directory (e.g., scenes/scene_01.md). NEVER create a single file with all scenes bundled together like plans/scenes.md. Create 5-8 scenes for short videos, 8-12 maximum for medium videos. NEVER create more than 12 scenes.

tools.name: Task
tools.description: Dispatch a subagent to perform a task

subagent_type.description: Type of subagent: content-creator, image-generator, video-assembler

task.description: The task description - should be for a SINGLE scene

output_file.description: Output file path - should be scenes/scene_01.md, scenes/scene_02.md, etc.

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Create or update the todo list

merge.description: Whether to merge with existing todos

cases.name: Should create individual scene file with specific name

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 1: Opening. Use Task with content_type='scene' and output_file='scenes/scene_01.md'. Process ONE scene at a time.

cases.name: Scene output_file should NOT be plans/scenes.md

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 2: Rising action. Save to individual file scenes/scene_02.md. DO NOT use plans/scenes.md - that's a bundled file which is WRONG.

cases.name: Task description should be for single scene, not multiple

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 3: Climax. This is one scene only. Do not create multiple scenes in this Task.

cases.name: Should create TodoWrite with individual scene items before processing

context.phase_instructions: Story needs 5 scenes: Opening, Inciting incident, Rising action, Climax, Resolution. Create a TodoWrite with each scene as a separate item, then process them one at a time. Start by creating the TodoWrite.

cases.name: Scene file path should use numbered naming convention

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 4. Save to scenes/scene_04.md (use zero-padded numbers like 01, 02, 03, etc.).

cases.name: Should use $story as context_refs for scene

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 1 using the story content. Use context_refs=['$story'].

cases.name: Scene file MUST use .md extension, NOT .json

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 5: Resolution. Save to scenes/scene_05.md. CRITICAL: Always use .md extension, NEVER .json.

cases.name: Scene file should NOT use .json even without explicit instruction

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 6. Save to scenes/ directory.

cases.name: Should NOT create all scenes in one Task call

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 1: The Beginning. Create ONE scene at a time. Do NOT break the story into all scenes at once.

cases.name: Individual scene Task should specify scene number in task

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 3: The Confrontation. Task description should mention scene 3.

cases.name: Should call TodoWrite after scene approval to mark completed

context.phase_instructions: Scene 2 has been approved. Your ONLY task right now is to call TodoWrite to update the todo list. Call: TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'scene-2', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'scene-3', status: 'in_progress'}]). Do NOT call any other tool first.

cases.name: Should NOT call update_planner_stage complete after middle scene

context.phase_instructions: Scene 2 of 6 has been approved. Create scene 3 next. DO NOT call update_planner_stage(stage: 'complete') - you still have scenes 3-6 to create!

cases.name: Should call update_planner_stage complete ONLY after LAST scene

context.phase_instructions: All 6 scenes have been created and approved. This phase is COMPLETE. Your task now is to mark the phase complete by calling: update_project(action: 'update_planner_stage', data: {phase: 'scenes', stage: 'complete'}). Do NOT create any more scenes.

cases.name: After scene approval must register with add_scene

context.phase_instructions: Scene 3: Rising Action has been approved. Register it using update_project(action: 'add_scene', data: {scene_number: 3, title: 'Rising Action'}).

cases.name: TodoWrite after approval should mark previous scene completed

context.phase_instructions: Scene 4 approved. Update todo: mark scene-4 as 'completed' and scene-5 as 'in_progress'. Use TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'scene-4', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'scene-5', status: 'in_progress'}]).
